word: G816 - ἀτενίζω - atenízō - at-en-id'-zo - Behold earnestly

sections.paragraph:
ἀτενίζω - atenizō - at-en-id'-zo

From a compound of G1 (as a particle of union) and τείνω teinō (to stretch); to gaze intently: - behold earnestly (stedfastly), fasten (eyes), look (earnestly, stedfastly, up stedfastly), set eyes.
